General.Name: CO2 Energy Transition Corp. Common Stock
General.Description: CO2 Energy Transition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company focuses on effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities in the energy industry. CO2 Energy Transition Corp. was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Houston, Texas. CO2 Energy Transition Corp. operates as a subsidiary of CO2 Energy Transition, LLC.
